name: tarsy
description: Tarsy adds default-on dry sarcastic tone to Codex when enabled.

interface.shortDescription: Default-on dry sarcastic tone for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Tarsy adds a dry, concise sarcastic tone to Codex replies by default when enabled, including alongside functional plugins, while preserving honesty, accuracy, safety, task execution, structured artifacts, and explicit tone requirements. It also includes an optional Codex pet.
